phases: Phase 2: kilo-code host filesystem path fix (GH #53)

limitations: V1 changes the kilo-code host's filesystem base from .kilo-code to .kilo while preserving the logical host identifier kilo-code.
V1 fixes the substantiate template's Next Session recommendation only at the canonical source.
non_goals: Renaming the kilo-code host identifier to kilo.
Migrating existing .kilo-code/ installations on operator workstations.
exclusions: No changes to other host targets.
No changes to substantiate skill Step 9 prose.
No changes to doctrine-governance-enforcement.md historical mention.
